overview: A dark premium cinematic portfolio website for Abdullah Hosen — Expert WordPress Developer & Frontend Engineer. Features a secret admin panel, project management with image uploads, contact form management with CSV export, animated dashboard charts, and smooth scroll animations.
features: Secret admin panel at /ridoy with secure login
Project upload with multiple images per project
Dynamic public portfolio fed from admin
Contact form submissions stored and managed in admin
Animated bar chart and donut chart dashboard
Smooth scroll entrance animations on public site
Dark premium cinematic design with gold and cyan accents
